steps.title: Identify the key requirement
steps.content: The task is to provide a specific example of onomatopoeia—meaning the response must name an actual onomatopoeia word and demonstrate how it imitates a sound.

steps.title: Check which choice accomplishes this
steps.content:
B provides the specific word “tuk-tuk” and shows it imitates a heartbeat, directly fulfilling the goal.

A, C, and D either define the term, explain variation generally, or acknowledge different words exist—but don't actually name or identify the onomatopoeia words themselves.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
